templates.title: Aggregate measures by a categorical dimension
templates.promptSkeleton: SELECT <dimension>, SUM(<measure>) FROM <schema>.<fact_table> GROUP BY <dimension> ORDER BY SUM(<measure>) DESC;
templates.notes: Remind learners to alias aggregates and push predicates before grouping.

templates.title: Join fact to dimension with filters
templates.promptSkeleton: SELECT <fields> FROM <schema>.<fact> f JOIN <schema>.<dimension> d ON d.id = f.dim_id WHERE <filter>;
templates.notes: Highlights the need to limit the projection when previewing data.
